SLOT xovi_Settings_Item

    INSERT {

        ~&14125623155555875541&~ {
            ~&5972374&~: root_Multiple_Navigation_History

            /* Run "~/xovi/debug" on terminal (reMarkable)*/
            /* true = Debug mode / false = Release mode*/
            /* Warning – Changes the path to the files "open_File()"*/
            property ~&6503679477&~ is_Debug_Mode: ~&6504329801&~
            /* -----------------------------------------------------*/

            /* Initializing variables - Main*/
            property ~&7083178290016&~ set_Label: ~&6504222003&~("Multiple navigation history")
            property ~&7083178290016&~ set_Description: ~&6504222003&~("Use the jump back as often as needed in PDF files.")

            property ~&7083178290016&~ set_Text_01: ~&6504222003&~(~&"7712198086779994&~)

            property ~&7083178290016&~ set_Status_01: (!~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Timer ? ~&6504222003&~(~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.text_Timer) : ~&6504222003&~(~&"7082553357604&~)) + " / " + (~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_X_Circle ? ~&6504222003&~(~&"6504329801&~) : ~&6504222003&~(~&"214625660372&~))

            property ~&197102514&~ dictionary_Data: [
                { ~&6504315758&~: root_Multiple_Navigation_History.set_Text_01, ~&7083177691309&~: root_Multiple_Navigation_History.set_Status_01, name_File: ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.set_Name_Extension + "_Settings" }
                /* ...*/
            ]
            /* -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/


            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~ {
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&214632764553&~: root_Multiple_Navigation_History.set_Label
                ~&478136262235079021&~: root_Multiple_Navigation_History.set_Description

                ~&7082453764199&~: ~&12858967014938070090&~ {
                    ~&233723734822480&~: ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History
                    ~&254547663413443306&~: ~&214625660372&~

                    ~&2132408976983288956&~.~&254542253295368380&~: {
                        ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History = !~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History;
                        ~&7082020628281&~.function_Xovi_Main.show_Console_Message(~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Debug_Mode, "New is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History is: " + ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History);

                        /* Reset values*/
                        ~&5972376&~ (!~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History && ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Xovi_Main.is_Enabled_Restore_Default_Settings) {
                            ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.reset_Values();
                            ~&7082020628281&~.function_Xovi_Main.show_Console_Message(~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Debug_Mode, "Values are reset");
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502554441&~ {
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History
                
                ~&7712155293725601&~ {
                    ~&214634455770&~: root_Multiple_Navigation_History.dictionary_Data

                    ~&7712922269353028&~: ~&17505001443493339609&~ {
                        required property ~&197102514&~ ~&254539508423767444&~
                        
                        ~&6504315758&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504315758&~
                        ~&7083177691309&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.~&7083177691309&~
                        ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                            ~&7082020628281&~.function_Xovi_Main.open_File(root_Multiple_Navigation_History, "root_Multiple_Navigation_History", ~&254539508423767444&~.name_File, ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Debug_Mode, ~&7713561876955258&~);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: {
                ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Debug_Mode = is_Debug_Mode;
            }
        }
    }
END SLOT

AFFECT [[1658694193319203921]]
    IMPORT Qt.labs.settings 1.0

    TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]

        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            /* Initializing variables - Access the "settings_Multiple_Navigation_History"*/
            property ~&214620122227&~ settings_Multiple_Navigation_History: settings_Multiple_Navigation_History
            /* --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

            ~&7712198086779994&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: settings_Multiple_Navigation_History
                ~&7712874798136519&~: "xovi_Settings_" + set_Name_Extension

                /* Initializing variables - Name extension*/
                property ~&7083178290016&~ set_Name_Extension: "document_Multiple_Navigation_History"
                /* -----------------------------------------------------------------------*/

                /* Initializing variables - Main*/
                property ~&6503679477&~ is_Debug_Mode: ~&214625660372&~
                property ~&6503679477&~ is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History: ~&214625660372&~
                /* --------------------------------------------------------*/

                /* Settings*/
                property ~&6503679477&~ is_Enabled_Timer: ~&214625660372&~
                property ~&6503679477&~ is_Enabled_X_Circle: ~&6504329801&~
                property ~&6503679477&~ is_Enabled_Divider: ~&214625660372&~

                property ~&7083178290016&~ text_Timer: ~&"7713407746360446&~

                property ~&197088788&~ set_Timer: 8000
                /* -----------------------------------------*/

                function get_Default_Values() {
                    ~&7083121450889&~ {
                        /* Main*/
                        is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History: ~&214625660372&~,

                        /* Reset values - Settings*/
                        is_Enabled_Timer: ~&214625660372&~,
                        is_Enabled_X_Circle: ~&6504329801&~,
                        is_Enabled_Divider: ~&214625660372&~,

                        text_Timer: ~&"7713407746360446&~,

                        set_Timer: 8000
                        /* -------------------------------------------*/
                    }
                }

                function reset_Values(~&6503992357&~) {
                    ~&7082020628281&~.function_Xovi_Main.reset_Values(~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History, ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.get_Default_Values(), ~&6503992357&~);
                }
            }
        }

    END TRAVERSE

END AFFECT


AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    IMPORT Qt.labs.settings 1.0

    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]

        LOCATE AFTER [[5972374]]
        INSERT {
            property ~&197102514&~ dictionary_History: []
        }

        LOCATE AFTER [[6502786168]]#[[6314931342039497581]]
        REBUILD [[214622501183]]
            LOCATE BEFORE ALL
            INSERT {
                ~&6504254477&~.~&233725082386405&~();
            }
        END REBUILD

        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            function ~&233725082386405&~() {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History) {
                    ~&16233397387354133199&~.~&6504295855&~();
                    dictionary_History = [];
                    ~&7082020628281&~.function_Xovi_Main.show_Console_Message(~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Debug_Mode, "Clear dictionary_History");
                }
            }
        }

    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[5728643844066569666]]#[[254547437090201330]]

		REPLACE [[18195120765075523889]] WITH {
            ~&18195120765075523889&~: (~&8399749361744822237&~, ~&7712900563799906&~) => {
                ~&6504254477&~.dictionary_History.~&6504189257&~(~&7712900563799906&~);
                ~&7082020628281&~.function_Xovi_Main.show_Console_Message(~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Debug_Mode, "New dictionary_History is: " + ~&6504254477&~.dictionary_History.~&197092711&~(~&180985&~ => ~&180985&~ + 1));

                ~&197091758&~ custom_Linked_Page
                ~&197091758&~ custom_Curr_Page = ~&6504254477&~.dictionary_History[~&6504254477&~.dictionary_History.~&7082886407723&~ - 1];
                ~&7082020628281&~.function_Xovi_Main.show_Console_Message(~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Debug_Mode, "New custom_Curr_Page is: " + custom_Curr_Page);

                show_History_Back();

                function show_History_Back() {
                    ~&6504254477&~.~&16765420033347753489&~({
                        ~&233736549263054&~: `page ${custom_Linked_Page === undefined ? linkedPage + 1 : custom_Linked_Page + 1} of ${root.pageCount}`,
                        ~&7082453764199&~: `Back to page ${custom_Curr_Page + 1}`,
                        ~&254542236275632405&~: () => {
                            ~&6504254477&~.~&7713405014271992&~(custom_Curr_Page, ~&14175747548438644067&~.~&10593835380864769165&~.~&7442916920529273295&~);

                            custom_Linked_Page = ~&6504254477&~.dictionary_History[~&6504254477&~.dictionary_History.~&7082886407723&~ - 1];

                            ~&6504254477&~.dictionary_History.~&197096440&~();

                            custom_Curr_Page = ~&6504254477&~.dictionary_History[~&6504254477&~.dictionary_History.~&7082886407723&~ - 1];

                            ~&5972376&~ (!~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History ||
                                ~&6504254477&~.dictionary_History.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) {
                                ~&6504254477&~.~&233725082386405&~();
                            } ~&6503784146&~ {
                                show_History_Back();
                            }
                        },
                        custom_Button: ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History && ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_X_Circle,
                        custom_onClicked: () => {
                            ~&6504254477&~.~&233725082386405&~();
                        },
                        custom_Divider: ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History && ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Divider,
                        ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&11119534664549952261&~.~&254547519794454865&~
                    }, ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.is_Enabled_Multiple_Navigation_History ? ~&7082020628281&~.settings_Multiple_Navigation_History.set_Timer : 8000);
                }
            }
        }

	END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]] > [[11119534664549952261]] > [[214604601930]]#[[16233397387354133199]]

        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                ~&6504254477&~.~&233725082386405&~();
            }        
        } 

	END TRAVERSE

END AFFECT

AFFECT [[1051864309931719348]]
    IMPORT [[7082546018834]] 1.0

    TRAVERSE [[425121728314878811.11119534664549952261]]#[[6504254477]]

        LOCATE AFTER [[254526614718798478]]
        INSERT {

            /* Button "x"*/
            ~&6502786168&~ {
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: ~&7082729686082&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: !!~&6504254477&~.~&16299287846731412336&~?.custom_Button

                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502767986&~ {
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~

                    ~&6504284228&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&3842193742606557678&~
                    ~&214622605608&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&8399340017235344933&~
                    ~&7083172477658&~: ~&"5238431624643430066&~
                }

                ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.~&16299287846731412336&~?.custom_onClicked) {
                            ~&214622607920&~ ~&5972579&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&16299287846731412336&~.custom_onClicked();

                            ~&5972376&~ (~&5972579&~ === ~&214625660372&~) {
                                ~&7083121450889&~;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            /* Divider*/
            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&11119534664549952261&~.~&233683758819504&~ {
                ~&6504337259&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&6504337259&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: !!~&6504254477&~.~&16299287846731412336&~?.custom_Divider
            }
        }

    END TRAVERSE

END AFFECT
